services.summary: Removes hardened tartar above and below the gumline using ultrasonic scaling, then polishes away surface stains from coffee, tea, and tobacco.
services.name: Scaling & Polishing
services.tagline: Professional cleaning for healthy gums and a brighter smile.

services.summary: Composite (tooth-coloured) fillings repair decay, cracks, and minor fractures while preserving natural tooth structure. Glass ionomer fillings — which release fluoride — are also available.
services.name: Tooth-Coloured Fillings
services.tagline: Restore cavities with composite that matches your natural tooth.

services.summary: Simple and surgical extractions performed under local anaesthesia. Includes wisdom tooth removal, with detailed aftercare and replacement planning.
services.name: Tooth Extraction
services.tagline: Painless removal when a tooth can no longer be saved.

services.summary: Zirconia and PFM crowns to restore weakened or damaged teeth, plus bridges to replace missing teeth and stop neighbouring teeth from drifting.
services.name: Dental Crowns & Bridges
services.tagline: Durable restorations that look and feel natural.

services.summary: Complete, partial, and implant-supported dentures designed to fit comfortably, restore chewing and speech, and bring back your confident smile.
services.name: Dentures
services.tagline: Custom-made replacements for multiple missing teeth.

services.summary: Porcelain and composite veneers, plus ultra-thin no-prep laminates. Custom shells bonded to the front of teeth to correct colour, shape, and minor alignment.
services.name: Veneers & Laminates
services.tagline: Transform stained, chipped, or uneven teeth into a confident smile.

services.summary: Fixed metal braces gently move teeth into proper alignment using continuous, gentle pressure. Suitable for crowding, spacing, and bite issues.
services.name: Braces
services.tagline: Effective, reliable correction for moderate to complex cases.

services.summary: Custom-made transparent aligners replaced every 1–2 weeks. Removable for eating and brushing, ideal for teens and working professionals with mild to moderate cases.
services.name: Clear Aligners
services.tagline: Nearly invisible, removable trays that straighten teeth discreetly.

services.summary: Thin protective coatings painted onto the deep grooves of molars and premolars where toothbrushes can't reach. Quick, painless, and lasts 3–10 years.
services.name: Pit & Fissure Sealants
services.tagline: Painless cavity prevention for molars — reduces decay risk by up to 80%.

services.summary: Concentrated fluoride coating painted onto teeth. Strengthens enamel, remineralises weak areas, slows cavity-causing bacteria, and helps stop early decay. Safe for toddlers, children, and adults.
services.name: Fluoride Varnish
services.tagline: A quick, painless coating that strengthens enamel and fights cavities.

services.summary: A gentle alternative to extraction for baby teeth. Pulpotomy and pulpectomy clean infected pulp tissue and restore the tooth — keeping it functional until it falls out naturally.
services.name: Pulp Therapy (Kids)
services.tagline: Saves baby teeth from severe decay or infection.

services.summary: Tooth-shaped caps for severely decayed or fractured baby teeth. Includes durable stainless steel, tooth-coloured zirconia, and natural-looking strip crowns for front teeth.
services.name: Pediatric Dental Crowns
services.tagline: Stainless steel and zirconia crowns that protect damaged baby teeth.
benefits: Lasts until the tooth falls out

services.summary: Small fixed or removable appliances that keep the space open for the permanent tooth — preventing crowding and reducing the need for braces later.
services.name: Space Maintainers
services.tagline: Holds the gap when a baby tooth is lost too early.

services.summary: Custom-fitted mouth guards absorb impact and prevent broken or knocked-out teeth, lip and tongue cuts, and jaw injuries. Essential for contact sports and kids in braces.
services.name: Mouth Guards for Kids
services.tagline: Custom protection for sports and orthodontic patients.

services.summary: Emergency response for falls, sports injuries, and accidents. Quick action — within 30–60 minutes for permanent teeth — gives the best chance of saving the tooth.
services.name: Dental Trauma (Kids)
services.tagline: Same-day care for chipped, knocked-out, or displaced teeth.

services.summary: A paediatric dentist evaluates your child's eating habits and provides personalised guidance — from snacking patterns to bottle feeding to tooth-friendly meal planning.
services.name: Diet Counselling (Kids)
services.tagline: Personalised guidance to prevent early-childhood cavities.
services.contentFile: Diet Counselling by a Paediatric Dentist.md
